title: DaoManager._rebuild_routes accesses private routing_table._routes
description:
File: python/src/lichen/rpl/dao.py:182-187

The _rebuild_routes() method directly accesses the private _routes attribute of RoutingTable:

```python
def _rebuild_routes(self) -> None:
    self.routing_table._routes.clear()  # Direct access to private member
    for target in self._parent_map:
        path = self._assemble_path(target)
        if path:
            self.routing_table.add_route(target, path)
```

This violates encapsulation and couples DaoManager to RoutingTable's internal implementation. If RoutingTable's implementation changes (e.g., adds caching, events, or validation on clear), this code would break.

Fix: Add a clear() method to RoutingTable:
```python
class RoutingTable:
    def clear(self) -> None:
        self._routes.clear()
```

Then use:
```python
self.routing_table.clear()
```
